positive: A celestial, bioluminescent sloth hanging from an oversized jungle leaf, surrounded by whimsical, interconnected elements like glowing orbs, miniature iridescent mushrooms, and crystalline vines. The style should be maximalist, combining elements of vintage tattoo flash art, Art Nouveau linework, and delicate scientific illustration. Use deep jungle emeralds, sapphire blues, and pops of glowing neon pink and cyan for the bioluminescence. The composition must be perfectly symmetrical and centered, allowing for a clean print repeat. Strong, high-contrast silhouettes against a slightly darker, atmospheric background. Clean, scalable vector art look, highly detailed line work, 8k print quality.
negative: ugly, tiling, blur, bad anatomy, text, signature, watermark, logo, brand, cropped, disfigured, multiple subjects, low detail, messy, noise, artifacts
